text.tspan: T00NDUDE is a scratcher who has been propelled
to “fame” in less than a month. However, with this
fame, he has also become unkind. Now, he may
seem to be a kindhearted person on scratch, but
as with all scratchers, it isn’t the same on discord.
He has also said numerous mean comments on vc,
such as “Who is this unknown scratcher get out!!!”,
clearly being mean to scratchers he does not know
yet them being actually well known , and, as you all
probably know, the odd banana incident…
Odd Banana was apparently talking over him and
he got so mad because he wanted to yap about his
exe’s lore for 5 mins straight, even tho no one
wanted to hear it…you can already tell
that his personality ain’t the greatest.
